locust at lunch
This is a
sample
of our
Lunch Menu
, served every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday from 12:00 PM - 3:00 PM. Our lunch menu changes regularly, so dishes listed here are subject to change based on seasonality and availability of products, and whatever we're excited to be cooking each day.  Keep an eye on our Instagram
@locustnashville
for daily updates.
Reservations are required for Locust at Lunch.
photos by diana lee zaldo
*Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, or eggs may increase
your risk of food borne illness, especially if you have a medical condition.
Please alert your server to any food allergies or dietary restrictions.
